title: Microscopy-based bead protein-protein interaction assay
steps: Wash glutathione sepharose beads (GE Healthcare) with the reaction buffer (20 mM HEPES at pH 8.0, 200 mM NaCl and 1 mM TCEP) three times.
Make a mixture of 0.5 µM GST or GST tagged cargo receptors and different ATG proteins.
Incubate the protein mixture with 10 µL washed glutathione sepharose beads at room temperature for 1 h.
Wash the beads three times with reaction buffer.
Suspend the beads with 120 µL reaction buffer and transfer the beads to the observation chamber.
Acquire images on a Nikon A1 confocal microscope with a 63 × Plan Apochromat 1.4 NA objective.
creator: Chunmei Chang
